name: overnight-cli
description: Keep your coding agent running while you sleep. Rate-limit recovery, crash detection, Telegram/Slack alerts. Works with Claude, Codex, and Gemini.

scripts.package: npm run build && pkg dist/cli.js --config package.json --out-path releases
scripts.package:win: npm run build && pkg dist/cli.js --targets node22-win-x64 --config package.json --out-path releases
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && pkg dist/cli.js --targets node22-macos-x64 --config package.json --out-path releases
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && pkg dist/cli.js --targets node22-linux-x64 --config package.json --out-path releases
